prompt: Photograph of a finished half-bath refresh in a Lawrence MA two-family — small rectangular powder room, board-and-batten halfway up the walls painted satin white, walls above papered in a fine geometric navy-and-cream pattern. Single 24-inch white pedestal sink with a polished-chrome single-handle faucet. A simple round chrome-trim mirror, a single matte-black sconce above. Wide-plank oak floor. Soft directional light from a small window outside frame. High-contrast, slightly desaturated photography, working-contractor documentary catalog feel — NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury hotel-staged, NOT real-estate photographer brightness. The lighting in a Snap-On distributor's tool room. No people in frame, no readable text anywhere, no logos, no brand names visible.
